examples: The people at my table were so obnoxious I had to change my seat.
CIBC successfully used a seed-feeding weevil, native to Mexico, to control the obnoxious parthenium weed, known to exert devious influence on agriculture and human health in both India and Australia.
If everyone were gooey and lovey-dovey, it would be an obnoxious world.
The doctors we interviewed agreed that getting the best care means being empowered but not obnoxious.
The far more obnoxious excuse is to demand that other people make the choice instead.
